title: CS Ethics (CS 391)

CS Ethics (CS 391)

Stub. OSU CS Ethics course Yahir took winter 2024 — assignments on crowdsourcing, social-media collaborations, and weekly discussion posts. Source of multiple Jan–Feb 2024 summaries and a non-trivial portion of his early-2024 written corpus.
